textile_history: Akha textiles are among the most visually striking of Thai hill tribes, featuring elaborate headdresses adorned with silver coins, beads, and pom-poms. The iconic Akha hat signals marital status and clan identity.
cultural_significance: Clothing distinguishes Akha from neighboring groups. Silver ornaments ward off evil spirits. The gate pattern (aw) represents the spiritual boundary between the village and the outside world.
